enemy_system.philosophy: Enemy evolution mirrors floor progression. Simple → Complex → Intelligent. Each floor has unique enemy archetypes + 1 boss.
enemy_system.combat_style: Twin-stick roguelike. Kiting, positioning, pattern learning. Emergent interactions between enemies and hazards.

floor_1_lab.theme: Equipment gone wrong. Simple mechanics. Playful but grimdark.
floor_1_lab.visual_palette: Whites, grays, blacks with neon pink/blue accents. Clean geometric rooms, metal surfaces, glass, plastic.
floor_1_lab.feel: Playful, scientific, no real threat. Learning space.

enemies.name: Runaway Beaker
enemies.description: Lab equipment rolling out of control
enemies.behavior: Rolls toward you, accelerates each turn

attack.effect: Leaves puddles of liquid as it rolls (slow you down)

enemies.strategy: Bait into walls, attack during recovery. Use puddles tactically.
enemies.twist: Can hit other enemies (use as weapon). Puddles slow YOU too (risk/reward).

enemies.name: Centrifuge

attack.pattern: 5 projectiles in rotating circular spray every 1.5 sec
attack.mechanic: Gaps between spray lines you can squeeze through

enemies.strategy: Predict spray gaps, position diagonally. Spray speed increases over time.
enemies.twist: Projectiles bounce off obstacles. Multiple centrifuges can sync (chaos).

enemies.name: Bunsen Burner

attack.pattern: Wide flame cone (120 degree arc) every 1.2 sec
attack.mechanic: Flame lingers briefly, creating temporary hazard zones

enemies.strategy: Move perpendicular to flame (strafe). Attack from sides.
enemies.twist: Flame ignites other enemies. Room temperature rises (activates other hazards).

enemies.name: Petri Dish Bloom
enemies.description: Fractal bacterial colony - splits when hit

tier_1_original.attack: Shoots 3 small bloom spores every 1 sec

tier_2_medium.behavior: Moves at same speed as original

strategy.aggressive: Kill original quickly before splits (7 sec window)
strategy.methodical: Let splits happen, manage multi-tier threats
strategy.ranged: Pick off spores as they come (safest, slowest)

enemies.twist: Spores can fertilize other blooms (cause faster splits). Fragments can merge if you're careless.

enemies.name: Rolling Stool
enemies.description: Lab stool on wheels, erratically bouncing
enemies.behavior: Rolls erratically, bounces around, no predictable path
enemies.strategy: Predict patterns (they emerge after observation). Use obstacles to funnel it.
enemies.twist: Collides with other enemies (pushes them). Can use stool as dynamic obstacle.

enemies.name: Spinning Ruler
enemies.description: Wooden ruler spinning rapidly on desk
enemies.behavior: Stationary, spins in place, blocks movement
enemies.strategy: Attack from gaps between ruler edges. Use it as cover from OTHER enemies' attacks.
enemies.twist: Blocks both your AND enemy projectiles (double-edged). Multiple rulers can synchronize.

boss.name: Entropy
boss.subtitle: Disorder in the Lab
boss.narrative: Lab equipment breaking down. Entropy (disorder) consuming everything.
boss.appearance: Vortex of dissolving lab equipment (beakers, tubes, papers swirling). Purple + neon pink. Center is dark, edges show destruction.
boss.behavior: Stationary vortex in center of arena

phase_1.pattern: 8 equipment fragments in circular spread, rotating slowly
phase_1.mechanic: Gaps between projectiles you can move through

phase_2.secondary_attack: Spawns small Spilled Liquid entities drifting outward

strategy.phase_1: Learn spiral rhythm, find gaps, circle around

boss.visual_progression: Boss grows more chaotic as phase progresses. Equipment visible inside vortex.

hazards.description: Occasional damage zones from broken equipment

floor_2_geosphere.theme: Ancient rocks, minerals, geological forces. Heavy, tanky, slow but devastating.
floor_2_geosphere.visual_palette: Browns, grays, golds, reds. Jagged rocky rooms, crystal formations. Lava glows orange/red. Deep, ancient, solid.
floor_2_geosphere.feel: Heavy, immovable, geological power. Positioning around LARGE objects.

enemies.name: Crystal Shard Colony
enemies.description: Cluster of glowing crystals jutting from ground

attack.pattern: 4 LARGE crystal shards in cardinal directions (N/S/E/W)
attack.visual_spectacle: After 3 rotations, explodes into smaller crystals briefly

enemies.strategy: Attack from diagonal angles between shard lines. Position in safety zones. Kite indefinitely.
enemies.twist: Shards embed in walls (create obstacles). Embedded crystals reflect YOUR projectiles (hazard).

enemies.name: Pressure Stone
enemies.description: Massive rounded boulder with stress fractures
enemies.behavior: Moves slowly but RELENTLESSLY toward you. Never stops.

attack.secondary: Leaves cracks in ground as it moves (create obstacles)

crack_mechanic.hazard_escalation: Stone gets FASTER as cracks fill arena

enemies.strategy: Lead into obstacles, use as barriers. Attack from sides while passing. Bait into crushing other enemies.
enemies.twist: If stone hits another stone, they MERGE (larger threat). Cracks become impassable (spatial lock).

enemies.name: Thermal Vent Chimney
enemies.description: Vertical rock column with steam radiating visibly

attack.aftermath: Leaves hot zone (2 dmg/sec standing in it)

enemies.strategy: Time attacks between eruptions. When eruption happens, move TOWARD vent (safest zone is center). Attack from hot zones (risky but effective).
enemies.twist: Multiple vents create LAYERED eruptions (cascading waves). If vents sync, massive combined shockwave (devastating).

enemies.name: Fault Line Fissure

tier_1_primary.behavior: Moves slowly in one direction, creates cracks
tier_1_primary.attack: Contact: 8 dmg. Cracks left behind: 2 dmg/sec
tier_1_primary.spawn_secondary: Every 2 sec, splits off secondary fault

intersection_mechanic.effect: When faults cross, HIGH-DAMAGE ZONES appear (5 dmg/sec)

strategy.navigation: Let faults split, use pattern as cover
strategy.spatial_lock: Let faults fill arena (high-risk, forces aggression)

enemies.twist: Faults create 'sealed zones' (completely surrounded by cracks). Faults can collide with other enemies (push them, create chains).

enemies.name: Tremor Beetle
enemies.description: Giant crystalline beetle with bioluminescent spots

attack.stun: Brief stun (0.5 sec) if hit by stomp

enemies.strategy: Timing-based: dodge stomps, attack during wind-up. When beetle stomps, briefly vulnerable (recovery frames). Bait stomps into walls.
enemies.twist: Multiple beetles create RESONANT STOMPS (amplify each other). If beetles stomp in sync, massive combined shockwave (devastating). Beetle shells partially reflect projectiles (armor).

enemies.name: Mineral Spike
enemies.description: Sharp mineral formation jutting from ground

attack.retraction: Creates window to attack or pass

enemies.strategy: Time movement/attacks to expansion cycle. Attack during retraction. Use expanded state as cover.
enemies.twist: Multiple spikes can interlock (create impossible geometry). Growing spikes can crush other enemies.

boss.name: Tectonic Titan
boss.subtitle: Earth's Power
boss.narrative: Raw geological force moving through the world.
boss.appearance: Massive animated stone/mountain entity. Cracks visible on surface. Ominous, immovable.
boss.behavior: Mobile, slow, devastating. Charges at player

charge_attack.description: Builds up then charges in straight line

earthquake_waves.description: Creates earthquake waves across entire screen
earthquake_waves.pattern: Multiple radial waves emanating from boss

shockwave_aftermath.description: After earthquake, creates cracks in terrain

boss.strategy: Dodge charges by moving perpendicular. Use terrain to block charges. Attack from sides during recovery.

hazards.description: Screen shakes, cracks appear that trap you
Stands crumble, must move to avoid

floor_2_geosphere.hazard_philosophy: Heavy, dangerous terrain. Must navigate carefully. Spatial awareness critical.

floor_3_hydrosphere.theme: Fluid, reactive, proto-biological. Alive but alien. Unpredictable.
floor_3_hydrosphere.visual_palette: Deep blues, teals, purples. Murky water, bioluminescent greens/yellows. Primordial feeling. Pressure visible.
floor_3_hydrosphere.feel: Alive but alien, unpredictable. Survival mechanic layer (air, pressure, currents).

enemies.name: Primordial Blob
enemies.description: Amorphous mass that splits when hit

attack.splitting: When hit, splits into 2 smaller versions (creates tactical choice)

enemies.strategy: Either kill quickly before splits or manage all fragments. Tactical choice each room.
enemies.twist: Splits create smaller threats but also more projectile targets. Can use splits against other enemies.

enemies.name: Thermal Vent
enemies.strategy: Avoid spray zones. Attack from sides or when vent recovers.
enemies.twist: Heat can ignite other enemies or environmental elements.

enemies.name: Chemical Reaction
enemies.behavior: Expanding cloud that spreads across arena
enemies.strategy: Kill quickly before it covers too much space. Funnel it into corners. Use room layout defensively.
enemies.twist: Can combine with other hazards (reacts with lava, electricity). Enemies touching it become poisoned (extra damage to them).

enemies.name: Proto-Swimmer
enemies.behavior: Quick, unpredictable movement patterns (first truly 'intelligent' enemy)
enemies.strategy: Requires quick reflexes. Pattern observation critical.
enemies.twist: First enemy that feels like it's 'learning' your moves.

enemies.name: Pressure Squid

attack.aura_effect: Radius around it applies pressure debuff (slows + damage)

enemies.strategy: Attack from outside aura range. Create distance.
enemies.twist: Multiple squids' auras can stack (creates hazardous zones). Aura can crush other enemies.

enemies.name: Coral Formation
enemies.strategy: Time movement to growth cycles. Attack during shrinkage windows.
enemies.twist: Can create temporary walls that block enemy movement (advantage to you).

boss.name: The Nucleus
boss.subtitle: First Life
boss.narrative: Life emerges from chaos. Primordial cell consciousness.
boss.appearance: Large glowing cell with visible organelles inside. Bioluminescent. Alien but alive.
boss.behavior: Starts as single large cell. Spawns organelle enemies around it. When damaged enough, splits.

strategy.phase_1: Learn spray rhythm, dodge projectiles, damage nucleus
strategy.phase_2: Manage multiple nuclei, choose which to prioritize

boss.visual_progression: Nucleus glows brighter. Organelles become more visible. Split is visually spectacular.

hazards.description: Push you in directions, hard to resist

floor_3_hydrosphere.hazard_philosophy: Must manage air, pressure, currents. Survival layer adds complexity.

floor_4_atmosphere.theme: Weather, energy, chaos. Fast, explosive, dangerous.
floor_4_atmosphere.visual_palette: Bright yellows, electric blues, storm grays. High energy, particle effects. Clouds, lightning, radiation.
floor_4_atmosphere.feel: Chaotic, dangerous, high-energy. Reflexes and prediction critical.

enemies.name: Storm Vortex
enemies.strategy: Use wind pushback tactically. Position yourself.
enemies.twist: Wind can push other enemies (create chain reactions).

enemies.name: Lightning Strike
enemies.strategy: Pattern recognition. Where WILL it strike next?
enemies.twist: Can chain strike between enemies (create cascades).

enemies.name: Solar Flare
enemies.strategy: Predict burst timing, move away before explosion.
enemies.twist: Explosions can trigger other enemies' attacks (cause chains).

enemies.name: Pressure Wave
enemies.behavior: Creates shockwave walls that move across screen
enemies.strategy: Dodge predictable wave patterns. Pattern-based challenge.
enemies.twist: Waves can resonate (amplify each other if multiple).

enemies.name: Radiation Cell
enemies.strategy: Keep distance, attack from range. Avoid aura.
enemies.twist: Aura can combine with other radiation (hazard escalation).

enemies.name: Frost Shard
enemies.strategy: Attack while mobile, avoid contact.
enemies.twist: Cold can freeze other enemies (create tactical advantage).

boss.name: Stellar Furnace
boss.subtitle: Energy Enabling Life
boss.narrative: Sun's power drives everything. Core of all energy.
boss.appearance: Massive burning sphere radiating heat. Waves of energy visible. Ominous but beautiful.
boss.behavior: Stationary burning sphere. Radiates heat waves. Charges for major burst attacks.

radiating_patterns.description: Waves of heat radiating outward in patterns

charged_burst.description: Builds up then releases massive burst

boss.strategy: Learn heat wave patterns. Predict bursts. Attack during recovery.
boss.visual_progression: Furnace burns brighter. Heat waves become more intense.

hazards.description: Damage over time, must find safe zones

floor_4_atmosphere.hazard_philosophy: Energy hazards, environmental physics puzzle. Fast-paced.

floor_5_biosphere.theme: Complex, intelligent, evolved. ALL SYSTEMS AT ONCE. Chaos and mastery.
floor_5_biosphere.visual_palette: Every color, organic shapes. Living forests, vines, symbiotic structures. Reality shifts. Impossible geometry.
floor_5_biosphere.feel: Intelligent, adaptive, pinnacle of evolution. PURE CHAOS. Final exam.

enemies.name: Predator

attack.learning: Gets smarter as player repeats actions

enemies.strategy: Change tactics. Don't be predictable.
enemies.twist: First enemy that feels like true opposition.

enemies.name: Symbiote
enemies.description: Merges with other enemies, strengthens them
enemies.behavior: Seeks out other enemies to bond with

attack.bonding: Strengthens nearby enemies (multiplier on their damage)
attack.priority_target: Kill symbiote first or it buffs others

enemies.strategy: Tactical priority: eliminate symbiote before it bonds.
enemies.twist: Creates team dynamics. Must manage threat prioritization.

enemies.name: Consciousness Node
enemies.description: Stationary anchor that controls all enemies
enemies.behavior: Anchor point that coordinates all enemies

attack.command_effect: Coordinates other enemies, boost their behavior

enemies.strategy: Destroy consciousness node to disable enemy coordination.
enemies.twist: Destroying it dramatically changes room difficulty.

enemies.name: Apex
enemies.description: Combines best traits of all previous enemies
enemies.behavior: Uses attacks from ALL previous enemy types

attack.pattern_rotation: Cycles through all floor enemy patterns

enemies.strategy: Must know all enemy patterns. Test of mastery.
enemies.twist: Defeating it feels like understanding the whole system.

enemies.name: Reality Rift
enemies.strategy: Adapt to randomness. No prediction possible.
enemies.twist: Can create advantageous teleports (good RNG wins runs).

enemies.name: Void Entity
enemies.strategy: Requires intuition more than skill.
enemies.twist: Last boss-tier regular enemy. Feels otherworldly.

boss.name: The Infinitum
boss.subtitle: All Systems Combined
boss.narrative: All knowledge, all life, all systems at once. Source of everything. The origin understanding.
boss.appearance: Shifts between all previous boss visual styles. Reality unstable around it. Beautiful and terrifying.
boss.behavior: Shifts between all previous boss forms. Uses attacks from all previous bosses. Adapts to your playstyle.

phase_3_infinitum.adaptation: Learns what attacks work against you
phase_3_infinitum.final_form: True form emerges as you destroy it

boss.victory_feel: Complete understanding. All systems understood. Transcendence.
boss.post_victory_narrative: You understand. You return to the Lab, but changed. Ready to begin again with new knowledge.

hazards.description: Every hazard from all floors happening simultaneously

floor_5_biosphere.hazard_philosophy: EVERYTHING AT ONCE. Final test of complete mastery.

scaling_rules: Each floor has 6 unique enemies + 1 boss
Boss health scales: Entropy (40) → Tectonic (80) → Nucleus (120) → Furnace (160) → Infinitum (240)
Infinitum is 6x Entropy but spread across 3 phases
Each floor can have post-MVP boss variants (same health, different patterns)
Enemy health pools scale with player progression (artifacts, specializations, health)

narrative_progression.start: You wake up in The Lab (modern day). Ready to descend.
narrative_progression.floor_1_to_2: Entropy breaks the lab. You descend deeper to escape...
narrative_progression.floor_2_to_3: Tectonic forces push you down. You break through into water...
narrative_progression.floor_3_to_4: The Nucleus pulses. You rise upward through the layers...
narrative_progression.floor_4_to_5: The Stellar Furnace burns. You emerge into the Biosphere...
narrative_progression.floor_5_boss: The Infinitum. All systems at once. The source of everything.
narrative_progression.victory: You understand. You return to the Lab, but changed. Ready to begin again.

examples: THE ROCKY DEPTHS - 3.8 Billion Years Ago
THE FLOODED DEPTHS - 2.4 Billion Years Ago
ui_storytelling.enemy_descriptions: Hint at evolution and system role
ui_storytelling.specialization_unlocks: Unlock with narrative context (Paleontology after Tectonic Titan)

combat_design_philosophy.twin_stick_friendly: Kiting, positioning, pattern learning are core
combat_design_philosophy.emergent_interactions: Enemies affecting each other creates dynamic rooms
combat_design_philosophy.learning_curve: Floor 1 is learnable, each floor increases complexity
combat_design_philosophy.fractal_enemies: One signature enemy per floor creates replayability through mastery
combat_design_philosophy.boss_as_test: Each boss tests mastery of that floor's lessons
